DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS VICTOR PENA AND MONICA MARTINEZ'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. If referenced as an exhibit, the written agreements must be attached to the pleadings. Fraud must be pled with particularity, factually and specifically. See Lazar v. Superior Court (1996) 12 cal.4th 631, 638. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
